verses.text: Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen leuleu a
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen hih bangin pulak in: “ ‘A lauhuai ni,’ ci-in awng in
Minamte' siatna ding hun Topa ' ni hong naita hi
Egypt gamah galpi tung ding a, Ethiopia gamah lungkhamna lianpi om ding hi. Egypt gamah mi tampi kithat ding a, a neihsa khempeuh uh kipuakhia-in, gam hawmguakin kinusia ding hi
“Tua galpi in Ethiopia gam, Put gam, Lud gam, Arabia gam, leh Libya gam panin a kicial galkap khempeuh that ding a, keima mite' lak pana galkapte nangawn si ding uh hi

“Leilu lama om Migdol khuapi panin leitaw lam Siene khuapi dong, Egypt gam a hute khempeuh galsungah simang ding uh a, Egypt' kiphatsakpih a galkapteng simang ding hi, ci-in Topa Pasian in ka gen khin hi
Egypt gam, leitung gam khempeuhah a gamkhing pen suak ding a, khuapi dang a siate khempeuh sangin a khuapite siazaw ding hi
Keimah in Egypt gam haltumin, a gamsung a hute khempeuh ka beisak khit ciangin, Topa ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi
“Tua bangin Egypt gam a siat ni hun hong tun' ciangin bangmah khuaphawk loin a om Ethiopia mite kiangah kamtaite ka sawl ding a, amaute lau mahmah ding uh hi. Tua hun ding tu-in hong tungta hi
“Egypt' hauhnateng a sumai dingin Babylon kumpi Nebukhadnezzar ka zang ding hi
Amah leh a kihtakhuai a galkapte hong pai ding a, gamsung khempeuh susia ding hi. Namsau tawh Egypt mite vatlum ding a, gamsung khempeuhah misi luanghawm dim ding hi
Nail Gun a tui ka kangsak ding a, migilote' khutsungah Egypt ka koih ding hi. Gamdang mite in susia gawpin, gamkhing suaksak ding uh hi, Topa ahi keimah in ka ci khin hi
“Milim khempeuh ka susia ding a, Memfis khuapi-ah a om pasian manlote ka beisak ding hi. Egypt gam a uk ding kuamah om nawnlo ding a, mi khempeuh lausakin ka lingsakgawp ding hi
Egypt gam khanglam Pathros gamteng gamkhing ka suaksak ding a, Egypt gam saklamah a om Zoan khuapi ka hal ding a, kumpi khua ahi Thebes, gim ka pia ding hi
Egypt gamsungah khuapi muan'huai pen Pelusium khuapi, ka hehna ka thuaksak ding a, Thebes khuapi mi khempeuh ka sumai ding hi
Egypt gamsung khempeuh ka haltum ding a, Pelusium khuapi in gimna lianpi thuak ding hi. Thebes khuapikulh khempeuh kicimgawp ding a, tui in a khuapi tuum ding hi
On khuapi leh Pibeseth khuapi tangvalte, galsungah si khin ding uh a, adangteng salin kiman ding hi
Egypt' vangliatna ka suksiat ciangin Tahpanhes khuapi-ah khim zinggawp ding a, a kisaktheihpihna teng uh a beita ding hi. Egypt gamsung meiipi in khuhcip ding a, a mi khempeuh salin pai ding uh hi
Tu-a bangin Egypt tungah gim ka piak ciangin, Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi
Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawmlekhat kum, a kha masa a ni sagih ni-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Egypt kumpipa Faro' khut ka kuaihtansak zo hi. A khut damkikin namsau a tawizawhna dingin kuamah in a khut tuamsaklo hi

Tua ahih manin Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen in: Kei pen Egypt kumpipa Faro' lang ka hi hi. A khut a damlai pen leh a kitansa zong, a lang nihin ka kuaihtansak ding a, a khut panin namsau ka kiasak ding hi
Egypt mite pen, gam khempeuh leh minam khempeuhte lakah ka theh-thang ding hi
Tua ciangin Babylon kumpipa' khut ka khauhsak ding a, ama khutsungah ka namsau ka pia ding hi. Ahi zongin Egypt kumpipa Faro' khut ka kuaihtansak ding a, a langte' mai-ah tai-in a si ding hi

Amah ka thanemsak ding a, Babylon kumpipa ka thakhauhsak ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi. Babylon kumpipa' khutsungah ka namsau ka piak ciangin amah in Egypt lam a ngat ding hi
Tua ciangin gam khempeuh leh minam tuamtuamte lakah Egypt mite ka thehthang ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi.
